Visual QA (catastrophic): The QR code and associated text block obliterate part of the key information, and the 'Apply now' text is clipped/unreadable—this is a catastrophic readability/hierarchy error.
Visual QA (catastrophic): Contact CTA (apply/phone/email) is uncomfortably compressed and not immediately findable at mobile/screen glance compared to professional WhatsApp/FB/LinkedIn ads.
Visual QA score 82/100 is below the 85 publishable bar

Visual QA: Footer trust/agency elements are present but lack clear demarcation; the company name is somewhat buried and the visual footer execution is weak.
Visual QA: Canvas utilization is suboptimal: excessive dead space at the top, and a large white block (QR code) in the corner disrupts the canvas balance.
